zh.Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett是Walter de Halkett的女兒，於1323年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾。她於1335年與Henry Wardlaw在蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Halkett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name, possibly, according to Black, from Halkhead (Renfrews) or alternatively from Hawkwood (Lanarks), -et, he suggests, sometimes representing -wood.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett was born in 1323, in Roxburghshire, Scotland as the daughter of Walter de Halkett. She married Henry Wardlaw in 1335, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1390, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett est née en 1323, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, fille de Walter de Halkett. Elle a épousé Henry Wardlaw en 1335, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett wurde 1323 in Roxburghshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Walter de Halkett geboren. Sie hat 1335 in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland Henry Wardlaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett è nata il nel 1323 nel Roxburghshire, Scotland come figlia di Walter de Halkett. Lei sposato Henry Wardlaw nel 1335, nel Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1390, nel Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Halkett(은)는 1323년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Walter de Halkett의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1335년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 Henry Wardlaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности уилтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
